---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the high-fidelity portals.
title: "[BUG] <Short description of the portal/UI issue>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Which portal is affected?**
(e.g., Google_standard, Apple_discord, etc.)

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the UI/UX bug is.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen (e.g., matching the real-world login flow).

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Device/Browser**
- OS: (e.g., Windows, macOS, Android, iOS)
- Browser: (e.g., Chrome, Safari, Firefox)
- Flipper Zero Evil Portal version (if applicable)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
